chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-731 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearings of CMA No.3798/2024 05.03.2025 Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioners nor intimation received. Today learned A.A.G files report in respect of compliance of order dated 23.11.2022. Perusal of such report reflects that compliance of the above said order has been made and no case for further direction is made, thus, the contempt application is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
